'''govasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:robbable|robbable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:robbable|robbable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| govasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:govasithi|govasithi]] || [[word:govasiji|govasiji]] || [[word:govasishi|govasishi]] || [[word:govasiki|govasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:govasuthuthu|govasuthuthu]] || [[word:govasujuju|govasujuju]] || [[word:govasushushu|govasushushu]] || [[word:govasukuku|govasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:govasuthu|govasuthu]] || [[word:govasuju|govasuju]] || [[word:govasushu|govasushu]] || [[word:govasuku|govasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:govasufthuf|govasufthuf]] || [[word:govasufjuf|govasufjuf]] || [[word:govasufshuf|govasufshuf]] || [[word:govasufkuf|govasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:govasethe|govasethe]] || [[word:govaseje|govaseje]] || [[word:govaseshe|govaseshe]] || [[word:govaseke|govaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:govasothotho|govasothotho]] || [[word:govasojojo|govasojojo]] || [[word:govasoshosho|govasoshosho]] || [[word:govasokoko|govasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:govasotho|govasotho]] || [[word:govasojo|govasojo]] || [[word:govasosho|govasosho]] || [[word:govasoko|govasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:govasofthof|govasofthof]] || [[word:govasofjof|govasofjof]] || [[word:govasofshof|govasofshof]] || [[word:govasofkof|govasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:govasÃŸfthÃŸf|govasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfjÃŸf|govasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfshÃŸf|govasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfkÃŸf|govasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:govasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|govasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|govasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|govasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|govasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:govasÃŸfthÃŸf|govasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfjÃŸf|govasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfshÃŸf|govasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfkÃŸf|govasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:govasÃŸfthÃŸf|govasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfjÃŸf|govasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfshÃŸf|govasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govasÃŸfkÃŸf|govasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:govasÃḊthÃḊ|govasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:govasÃḊjÃḊ|govasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:govasÃḊshÃḊ|govasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:govasÃḊkÃḊ|govasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:govasathatha|govasathatha]] || [[word:govasajaja|govasajaja]] || [[word:govasashasha|govasashasha]] || [[word:govasakaka|govasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:govasatha|govasatha]] || [[word:govasaja|govasaja]] || [[word:govasasha|govasasha]] || [[word:govasaka|govasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:govasafthaf|govasafthaf]] || [[word:govasafjaf|govasafjaf]] || [[word:govasafshaf|govasafshaf]] || [[word:govasafkaf|govasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:govasasha|govasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:govashÃḋsha|govashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govasrosha|govasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govasmusha|govasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:govasyasha|govasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovasnkshÃḋsha|gogovasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovasnkrosha|gogovasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovasnkmusha|gogovasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovasnkyasha|gogovasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:govavasasha|govavasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govavashÃḋsha|govavashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govavasrosha|govavasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govavasmusha|govavasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govavasyasha|govavasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovavasnkshÃḋsha|gogovavasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovavasnkrosha|gogovavasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovavasnkmusha|gogovavasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovavasnkyasha|gogovavasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gevÃḊsasha|gevÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gevÃḊshÃḋsha|gevÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gevÃḊsrosha|gevÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gevÃḊsmusha|gevÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gevÃḊsyasha|gevÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogevÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gogevÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogevÃḊsnkrosha|gogevÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogevÃḊsnkmusha|gogevÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogevÃḊsnkyasha|gogevÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:govfasasha|govfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govfashÃḋsha|govfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govfasrosha|govfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govfasmusha|govfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govfasyasha|govfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovfasnkshÃḋsha|gogovfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovfasnkrosha|gogovfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovfasnkmusha|gogovfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovfasnkyasha|gogovfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
